title: Nenuu's Zombie Pack
description: This modpack has a zombie apocalypse theme as it's main feature, paired with mods like Create, Securitycraft, Immersive Engineering, and Warium.
body:
Zombie modpack with the goal of creating an entertaining apocalypse setting, it has mods like Securitycraft, Create, Warium, and Immersive Engineering, to name a few. 

For any Curseforge mods in the profile, i've made sure that their licensing allows redistribution, or otherwise I have permission from the developer.

For Vouniern's Turrets all credit goes to BlueDuck and his [mod on Curseforge]
(https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vounierns-turrets)

For Tissou's Zombie Pack all credit goes to Tissou and his [resource pack on Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20)

For the Acedium mod, all credit goes to ferriarnus and his [mod on Github](https://github.com/ferriarnus/acedium?tab=LGPL-3.0-1-ov-file#readme)

The licensing on the mods/packs allows for redistribution on Modrinth with credit.
